ai_summary: Kirloskar Oil Engines Limited (KOEL) has secured a significant order from HyperNext for 96 units of its 2500 kVA Optiprime™ Dual Core power systems, totaling 192 MW, for large-scale data center infrastructure. This substantial deal, described as one of India's largest deployments of high-capacity standby power systems for data centers, materially strengthens KOEL's market leadership in critical infrastructure for the rapidly expanding AI and cloud computing sectors. No immediate red flags are apparent in this positive announcement, though the specific financial value of the order is not disclosed.
